subject: Empty-proxy-pool banner on device card — ambient visibility for soft failure state (proxyPoolSize == 0)
context: When the APK's proxy pool is empty (no proxies available at /data/adb/sinister/proxies/ on-device), IP rotation silently fails. Device continues to operate but all outbound requests use the bare SIM/WiFi IP, increasing ban risk. This is a soft failure — account creation CAN still proceed — but operator has no visibility. This spec adds a passive amber banner on each device card in the panel dashboard so the operator immediately knows which devices are running proxy-pool-empty.

data_source.location: APK heartbeat body (JSON, sent to panel on each heartbeat interval)
data_source.availability: Field is PRESENT when APK has enumerated the proxy directory at least once (kernel-apk v0.97.36+). Field is ABSENT on older APK builds — treat as null (apply banner).

banner_spec.canonical_token: WARN (from sinister-theme-tokens.css — maps to #F59E0B or equivalent amber-500 equivalent)
banner_spec.text: PROXY POOL EMPTY — device may fail IP rotation
banner_spec.placement: Top of device card, below device name/status row, above account-count or last-heartbeat row
banner_spec.click_action: Navigate to proxy management view for this device (existing panel route or modal — panel lane decides; if no proxy management UI exists yet, click is a no-op or shows a toast 'No proxy management UI yet')
banner_spec.dismissal: Banner is NOT dismissable by operator click — it re-appears on every dashboard render while the condition holds. It auto-clears the moment a heartbeat arrives with proxyPoolSize >= 1.
banner_spec.badge_optional: Optionally show a small amber dot on the device list sidebar entry (not required for MVP — panel decides if sidebar is in scope)

ui_inheritance.base: dashboard-skeleton (.lg-* Liquid Glass classes + sinister-theme-tokens.css per operator hard-canonical 2026-05-24T15:44Z)
ui_inheritance.accent: amber (WARN token) — only the banner uses amber; device card accent stays purple per standing order
ui_inheritance.do_not_fork: Expand skeleton if an amber/warn banner primitive is missing; do NOT roll a one-off Banner component outside skeleton

backend_changes.note: proxyPoolSize already in heartbeat body (kernel-apk v0.97.36+). Panel backend just needs to pass it through to the device-card props. No new endpoint required. If panel currently strips unknown heartbeat fields, add proxyPoolSize to the allowed pass-through list.

asks: Add amber WARN banner to device card when proxyPoolSize == 0 || null, using WARN token from sinister-theme-tokens.css
Click-action opens proxy management view (or no-op toast if not yet built)
Ensure proxyPoolSize passes through heartbeat ingestion to device-card frontend props (may be a 1-line backend change or already passes through)
Confirm banner auto-clears on next heartbeat when proxyPoolSize >= 1
composes_with: _shared-memory/inbox/sinister-panel/2026-05-24T2018Z-from-kernel-apk-auto-fire-add-friend-on-push-spec.json (ask 3 in that spec flagged empty-proxy-pool guard banner as a fast-follow)
expected_response: Panel ack with (a) ETA for banner, (b) confirmation proxyPoolSize passes through or note if backend change needed, (c) whether proxy management UI exists to wire click-action to
